view.title: Validate persona scenario #3

items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: The exploratory step cannot be validated due to insufficient evidence regarding the scenario of payment going to the wrong business.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aims to validate the outcome of a scenario where a payment is misdirected, but there is no direct evidence or tests provided that confirm this specific functionality. The linked use cases and prior steps do not address the handling of payment misdirection, leading to an inconclusive status. Without concrete evidence or tests demonstrating how the system behaves in this scenario, the requirement remains unverified.
